notes: Reproduction of the team's earlier submission at commit 40976e8 (which scored -0.70 on the leaderboard). Trained fresh on personal Modal workspace via app ap-fGYnArG8X4o2M44KNzUify into volume eval-artifacts-baseline. Architecture: paraphrase-MiniLM-L3-v2 encoder (384-d), one-hot benchmark/condition, 4-layer MLP (256-128-64-1), Newton-Raphson theta adjustment from K=5 labels. NO mean-acc features, NO subject embeddings, NO Platt. The model.py and labeling.py in this submission are written fresh because commit 40976e8's model.py is inconsistent with its train_modal.py (model.py references subject_emb_index.json and subject_embeddings.npy which train_modal.py never produces). Sanity check: does our reproduction land near -0.70 on the leaderboard?
